goal: Build a rectangular-brick palletizer: 4 brick-shaped items (10cm × 5cm × 5cm) instead of cubes, palletized in 2x2 grid. Tests handler with non-cube object geometry. Industrial relevance: brick + tile + extruded-part handling.
thoughts:
Six brick-handling specifics for CP-42 (extends CP-08 — non-cube geometry):
1) Bricks: 10×5×5cm via Cube primitive scaled [0.05, 0.025, 0.025] (since default Cube size=2). Long axis along world X, narrow 5cm faces along Y and Z.
2) Gripper grips narrow 5cm Y-face (fingers open 4cm — fits 5cm cube but tight on 5cm brick face). Risky but possible.
3) On conveyor at y=0.4, oriented with long axis along world X. Belt motion in +X moves bricks lengthwise.
4) drop_targets: 4 positions on pallet, all bricks oriented same way (no rotation).
5) Pallet 0.30×0.30 — accommodates 4 bricks × 10cm long = 40cm if all aligned. Spread across diagonal: spacing 0.12m. Tight but fits with rotation off.
6) Tests handler's tolerance for non-cubic geometry. cuRobo's plan_pose uses bbox center — same as cube. Drop precision unchanged.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 4 rectangular bricks 10×5×5cm. Cube primitive default size=2; scale [0.05, 0.025, 0.025].
# Spaced 0.20m apart on conveyor (10cm brick + 10cm gap)
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.2, -1.0, -0.8]):
    path = f"/World/Brick_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], scale=[0.05, 0.025, 0.025])
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Brick_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Brick_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Pallet 0.30×0.30m
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pallet", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.15, 0.15, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# drop_targets — 2x2 grid centered on pallet, brick centers 0.12m apart
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Brick_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Brick_1": [-0.06, -0.46, 0.825],
        "/World/Brick_2": [ 0.06, -0.46, 0.825],
        "/World/Brick_3": [-0.06, -0.34, 0.825],
        "/World/Brick_4": [ 0.06, -0.34, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Pallet"],
)
extension_notes: CP-42 demonstrates handler with non-cube geometry (10×5×5cm rectangular bricks). Gripper grips narrow 5cm Y-face. cuRobo's plan_pose uses bbox center, agnostic to cube vs brick shape. Industrial use: brick palletizing, tile stacking, extruded-part transport.
failure_modes: Gripper too tight on 5cm brick face — Franka opens 4cm. May not close on 5cm brick. Tested probabilistically — sometimes works.
Brick orientation matters: long axis aligned with world X. Belt friction may rotate bricks during transit. Drop orientation undefined — function-gate physics-tuning-sensitive.
Bricks 10cm long → 4 bricks at 0.20m spacing on 3m conveyor takes 0.80m. Fits.
drop_targets at 12cm spacing on 30cm pallet — 4 bricks at 5cm narrow each = 20cm total, +4cm gap. Fits.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s. cube_final=(-0.09, -0.52, 0.825) in Bin)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, scale={{workpieces[0].scale}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, scale={{workpieces[1].scale}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, scale={{workpieces[2].scale}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, scale={{workpieces[3].scale}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{primary_destination.position}}, scale={{primary_destination.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
